summary: Final UAT covering Sections H through W (plus G.2, T, N, O, Q, R). All 25 backend tests pass (100%). All major UI features verified. No critical failures found.

issues: Portal nav data-testid count shows 10 items (includes hidden dropdown sub-items) but only 6 top-level items are visible - this is expected behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: PortalCafe: When cart auto-opens (addToCart triggers setCartOpen(true)), the backdrop overlay covers the Cart button, so clicking Cart button while cart is already open closes it (backdrop click) and immediately re-opens via button click. Minor UX confusion but functionality works.

OnboardingFlow modal (solomon_onboarding_done in sessionStorage) and DemoWalkthrough (solomon_walkthrough_member) overlap on first portal login, requiring multiple dismissals. Consider a single unified dismissal.
Live Mode requires at least 1 item in the plan - this is documented but the button is always visible even for empty plans, which could mislead users.
seed_data_creation: Created test session tokens (test_platform_session_h2w, test_church_session_h2w) in MongoDB for platform and church admin. Created a test service plan 'Test Sunday Service' with item 'Amazing Grace' for Services Live Mode testing. Created test church 'TEST_Church_{ts}' via API.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All H-W features verified. Backend: 25 tests pass (health, platform/churches health scores, add church, reports 9 tabs, bulk update, MultiPaymentSelector code check). Frontend: GodMode Solomon AI sidebar, Add New Church button, Churches health badges, Reports 9 tabs with Cross-Analysis 4 cards + Audit Log filter, GivingDashboard edu-header-giving, Services Live Mode full-screen overlay with Next button, People bulk select with Update Status, Portal nav 6 items (Kids Check-in/Give/Groups/Events/Shop/Learn), Portal Give dynamic tenant name, Integrations no Pushpay/SecureGive, SolomonPay Recurring tab with Run Now button, PortalCafe MultiPaymentSelector with pay-guest-card. MOCKED: SolomonPay SimulationAdapter, Apple Pay/Google Pay show toast.
